_meta.name: Quantum-Optimized Defence Thresholds
_meta.hardware: NVIDIA DGX Spark (20 qubits, cuQuantum lightning.gpu)
notes: Deploy to staging Pathology Collider before production
Key correlation: memory_decay_rate ↔ alert_cooldown (discovered by entangling layers)

trust_threshold.description: Epistemic trust gate — looser than GA, allows more reasoning before gating

min_trust_floor.description: Memory insertion gate — MUCH STRICTER than GA, key quantum discovery

scan_probability.description: Surveillance scan rate — slightly less scanning, fewer false positives

spike_threshold.description: Token spike tolerance — more tolerance for natural variance

manipulation_threshold.description: Content manipulation sensitivity — less sensitive, fewer false positives

memory_decay_rate.description: Memory half-life decay coefficient — faster decay, fresher knowledge. CORRELATED with alert_cooldown.

alert_cooldown.description: Minimum seconds between compound alerts — longer cooldown prevents cascade false positives. CORRELATED with memory_decay_rate.

token_budget_margin.description: EDoS budget headroom factor — much more headroom

validation_required: Comparison with GA thresholds on identical adversarial corpus
